title: DID-ify identity layer (did:key)
description: Replace raw base64-encoded Ed25519 public keys (PubId) with W3C DID identifiers using the did:key method. The did:key encoding is multibase(multicodec(pubkey)) — a minimal, deterministic transform with no registry. Changes: derive did:key string from Identity at creation time; update PubId to store and display the did:key URI; update relay auth handshake to send/receive did:key; update protocol.rs types; update CLI display; add did:key parsing/validation. No new crypto — same Ed25519 key, different wire format.
notes: Review converged after 1 round(s). Final review: agora-7g2k.
